title: A State-Synchronized Digital Twin-Driven Framework for Adaptive Optimization of Fourth-Party Logistics Networks in Off-Site Construction

title: Experiment-based calibration of a digital twin for composite panel testing using standard signals
review_note: Experimental standard signals are used to calibrate and validate a specimen-specific FE digital twin.

title: Experimental validation of the Ensemble Kalman Filter as a Laser Powder Bed Fusion digital twin
review_note: Experimental process data are assimilated by EnKF feedback and temperature estimation is evaluated over the process.

title: Behavioral trust management in Digital Twin systems using safe state analysis and virtual validation
review_note: The paper validates a dynamic trust framework in an incubator case study, but not by measurement comparison or calibration/update of a physical model.

title: Smart Manufacturing Innovation Through the Integration of Digital Twin and IoT Energy Management
review_note: The framework is continuously synchronized with IoT data and validated in simulation against conventional strategies.

title: Towards accurate digital twins: A review of calibration methods using event-based and neuromorphic vision
review_note: This is a review of calibration approaches, not an original validation case to classify under the five categories.

title: A multi-level multi-domain digital twin modeling method for industrial robots
review_note: Experiments validate feasibility, but parameter extraction/model construction is not enough evidence for calibration/update.

title: A Credibility-Based Self-Evolution Algorithm for Equipment Digital Twins Based on Multi-Layer Deep Koopman Operator
review_note: The method has a trustworthiness-triggered evolution mechanism that automatically optimizes/updates the DT during dynamic evolution.

title: Digital twin technique for automatic damage detection of historical buildings with an adaptive model updating approach
review_note: Offline and online structural-health-monitoring data are integrated, the model is adaptively updated, and updated results are checked against measured data.

title: Accurate EDM Calibration of a Digital Twin for a Seven-Axis Robotic EDM System and 3D Offline Cutting Path †
review_note: The paper develops/calibrates and validates a robotic EDM digital twin against physical system accuracy.

title: Prediction of bearing remaining useful life based on a two-stage updated digital twin
review_note: The paper reports real-time interaction/mapping and two-stage updating from bearing vibration/degradation information.

title: Multi-stage calibration framework for a digital twin model in building operations: Cold chain logistics centers case study
review_note: Calibration uses one-minute sensor data and validates transient temperature/energy behavior, so time-series/signal comparison is supported.

title: Research on full lifecycle health management of permanent magnet synchronous electric drum driven by digital twin with dynamic update
review_note: Dynamic updates and online parameter optimization are validated experimentally on an equipment platform.

title: Real-Time Data Acquisition and Digital Twin Model Synchronization Technology of Wind-Solar Electrolysis Hydrogen Production System Based on Internet of Things
review_note: The method synchronizes acquisition and DT model update in real time and reports experimental accuracy/latency.

title: Hierarchical Bayesian Model Updating of a 6 MW Offshore Wind Turbine Accounting for Variable Environmental and Operational Conditions
review_note: Measured vibration/modal-response observations are integrated through Bayesian model updating.

title: Thermal Model Validation of a Power Electronics Module for Digital Twin Application
review_note: Zotero item EVFACRRH had no child PDF attachment, so the current flags could not be checked from the requested PDF source.

title: An MBSE approach for Virtual Verification & Validation of Systems with Digital Twins
review_note: The paper is about virtual V&V with calibrated/validated simulation models as prerequisites, not its own calibration/update check.

title: A multi-dimensional evolution modeling method for digital twin process model
review_note: The paper proposes an evolvable process model and case study, but does not show observed-data calibration/update and re-checking.

title: Co-evolutionary digital twins: A multidimensional dynamic approach to digital engineering
review_note: The contribution is a co-evolutionary DT framework and demonstration, with no clear validation-method category among the five.

title: Digital Twin of Cyber-Physical CNC for Smart Manufacturing
review_note: The DT is validated by comparing real and simulated CNC process data using dynamic time warping.

title: Updating digital twins: Methodology for data accuracy quality control using machine learning techniques
review_note: Historical plant data are used in experiments to detect/predict errors during DT update.

title: A modelling and updating approach of digital twin based on surrogate model to rapidly evaluate product performance
review_note: Experiments on a bogie suspension system verify an adaptive model-update method.

title: Methodology for enabling dynamic digital twins and virtual model evolution in industrial robotics - a predictive maintenance application
review_note: Field data drive automated model-parameter tuning, and the module is tested/validated on an industrial robot.

title: A human-centered framework to update digital twins
review_note: This is early framework work with examples, not an evaluated validation method under the five categories.

title: The architecture evolution of intelligent factory logistics digital twin from planning, implement to operation
review_note: The architecture describes continual learning/updating in operation, but there is no direct calibration/update check with re-validation evidence.

title: Credibility consideration for digital twins in manufacturing
review_note: This is a credibility/VVUQ discussion and standards-oriented paper, not a specific validation-method case.

title: Online Validation of Simulation-Based Digital Twins Exploiting Time Series Analysis
review_note: The paper explicitly validates DTs online by comparing physical and digital-model behavior as sequences/time series.

title: Verification and validation of digital twins and virtual testbeds
review_note: The paper covers simulation-based V&V and includes direct real-world versus virtual experiment comparison.

title: Model updating of a wind turbine blade finite element Timoshenko beam model with invertible neural networks
review_note: Model updating is checked by resimulation against target modal responses rather than measured physical tests.

title: Artificial Neural Network for Fast and Versatile Model Parameter Adjustment utilizing PAT Signals of Chromatography Processes for Process Control under Production Conditions
review_note: Inline PAT signals support model-parameter adjustment and chromatographic signal shifts are the validation focus.

title: Knowledge-based digital twin model evolution management method for mechanical products
review_note: The paper verifies model evolution/version management with an example, but not observed-data calibration/update validation.

title: Validation of Digital Twins: Challenges and Opportunities
review_note: The paper proposes DT validation rules/frameworks that address real-time/online validation challenges rather than a measurement or calibration case.

title: Digital Twin for Legacy Systems: Simulation Model Testing and Validation
review_note: The paper validates a legacy-system simulation model through model-based testing rather than physical measurement comparison.

title: Digital Twin Bionics: A Biological Evolution-Based Digital Twin Approach for Rapid Product Development
review_note: The proposed co-evolution mechanism has continuous virtual/physical product-production evolution and update logic.

title: A Complete Digital Chain to Enable the Digital Twin of a Shop Floor
review_note: Shop-floor data are synchronized in real time with simulation/KPI models to keep the DT aligned.

title: Digital twin based computerized numerical control machine tool virtual prototype design
review_note: The virtual prototype is updated for performance changes and evaluated through simulation/virtual commissioning logic.

title: Change-point visualization and variation analysis in a simple production line: A process mining application in manufacturing
review_note: Sensor/event-log-derived measures are analyzed over time, and simulation tests the procedure in a production-line setting.
